form.formComment: 10-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at this track both over 1609m. Last start won by 6 m as favourite (Fr5) at this track (1:55.30) beating Gabbys Rockytop in NW10000L4 on March 29 at $2.60. Going very well and deserves top billing.
